Voice.name: Welcome
Voice.audioText: Hello! How can I help you?

Voice.name: Asking
Voice.audioText: Hello! How can I help you?

Voice.name: MatchedMultiple
Voice.audioText: Find relevant services for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the balance inquiry service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the password modification service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the card opening service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the account opening service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the QR code transaction service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the electricity service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the water service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the gas service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the biometrics service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the bill payment service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the human service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the cash deposit service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the cash withdrawal service for you

Voice.name: MatchedTrans
Voice.audioText: Find the foreign exchange service for you

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Thank you for using our service. Have a great day! Goodbye!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please insert your card to continue or say cancel to exit.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Processing, please wait!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please enter your PIN to check the Balance!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please check your balance. When you're done, say confirm to exit

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Sorry, your card is invalid

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: PIN correct!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: PIN correct, please enter your new PIN!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please re-enter your new PIN!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Your PIN has been changed successfully.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please wait while we connect you to an agent.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please read the user agreement

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: We need to scan your ID. Which type do you have?

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please put the ID card on the scanner

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Information is being reviewed. Please wait

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please put your passport on the scanner

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Passport is not recognized, would you like to try again?

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please input your personal information

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please sign on the screen

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Printing your application form, please wait!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please put your application form to the scanner!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Dispensing card, please wait!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please take your card!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Agent refused the request.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Host refused the request.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Card has been captured.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Printing receipt, please wait!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Account successfully opened

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please open the app and scan the QR code, or say cancel to exit.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Welcome! Please select your transaction account, or say cancel to exit.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please enter your PIN!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Account creation failed.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Account created successfully!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please select a transaction

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please enter your ID number and say confirm to proceed, or say cancel to exit.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please look at the camera to take your picture

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Image quality check failed. Please try again.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Your face has been successfully registered.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Host refused the request. Please try again.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Face authentication failed

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please scan your finger vein once using one finger

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Fingerprint matched successfully.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Match failed. please try to use another one

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please scan your fingerprint three times using the same finger

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Fingerprint match failed.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: You are not registered in our system. Please register first.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please select the login way or say cancel to exit

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please put the passport on the scanner or say cancel to exit

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please scan your QRCode or say cancel to exit

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please select your bill, or say cancel to exit, or say back to go back.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please check your bill information and say confirm to proceed, or say cancel to exit, or back to go back.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please select the payment method, or say cancel to exit, or say back to go back.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Processing. Please Wait!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please put in cash and say confirm to proceed.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Counting cash, please Wait..

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Payment complete. Do you want to print a receipt?

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: A hardware error occurred. Please wait while your cash is being returned.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Operation timed out. Cash rejected.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Returning cash. Please wait.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Failed to return cash. Recovering cash now.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please wait!

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please take your change

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please select the payment method or say cancel to exit

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please select the currency, or say cancel to exit, or back to go back.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please insert your cash and say Confirm to proceed

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please confirm your information. You can say confirm to proceed, add cash to add more, or cancel to exit

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Withdrawal complete. You can say confirm to print receipt or cancel to skip.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please select and say the item to continue

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please insert your card

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please enter your pin

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please enter your withdrawal amount in multiples of 10 and say confirm to proceed

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please take your cash. Be sure to remove all bills

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Withdrawal complete. Do you want to print a receipt?

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please put your cash into cash slot

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please check the deposited amount and say confirm to continue

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please remove refused notes

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please wait for approval

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please scan your finger print once using one finger

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Match succeeded

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please scan your fingervein three times using the same finger

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Match failed.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please take back your passport.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Passport is not recognized.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: You are having a video call with human teller. Our teller can assist you with following transactions: Account opening, Account information modification, Account closing, Password reset, Loan application and consultation, Credit card services, Card loss reporting and replacement, Or anything you need from bank teller.

Voice.name: ActionUI
Voice.audioText: Please read the document thoroughly and click agree to confirm.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Sorry, we couldn't find the service you need

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Okay, please proceed with the current transaction

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: The annual fee for credit cards varies by card type. Please call our credit card customer service hotline at 123456 for inquiries.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Please bring your ID and go to the manual counter to process the transaction. You can also scan the code to download or log in to the mobile banking app for self-service processing.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: The transaction limit is in place to protect the security of your account and funds. If needed, you can go to the counter to handle the transaction.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: You can either go to the counter with your ID or apply through the mobile banking app.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Credit card installment applications can be processed through the mobile banking app and customer service hotline at 123456.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Credit card limit adjustments can be processed through customer service hotline at 123456 or in-branch submission.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: You can inquire about your loan repayment plan through the mobile banking app or at the counter.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Our bank's credit cards offer various repayment methods, including the mobile banking app's credit card repayment feature, in-branch deposits, scheduled repayments, and online third-party payment channels.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: To close your credit card account, please ensure that all outstanding balances are paid off. You can call our credit card customer service hotline at 123456 or bring a valid ID and your card to a branch.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Hello, how can I assist you?

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: I'm doing well, thank you. How can I assist you?

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: I am GRGBanking AI Teller.I can provide you with thoughtful service!

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: I can help you with business-related questions, quickly find the services you need, and provide you with thoughtful guidance!

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: I can assist you with cash deposits, withdrawals, or other banking services.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: I'm not connected to the internet, so I don't know the weather conditions at the moment.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: I can't do that yet. You can try asking me other questions.

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: See you next time

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: You're welcome, feel free to ask any questions at any time

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Sorry, I will work hard to improve and strive to satisfy you next time

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Thank you for your compliment. It's a pleasure to serve you

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Sorry, I haven't learned this question yet

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: This question is a bit out of scope, I will continue to learn

Voice.name: chat
Voice.audioText: Sorry, I am still working hard to learn the relevant knowledge
